query: SELECT tn.id, tn.employeeId, tn.dataFim, tn.tipo, tn.status, e.nomeCompleto FROM termination_notices tn LEFT JOIN employees e ON tn.employeeId = e.id WHERE tn.status = 'em_andamento' ORDER BY tn.dataFim ASC LIMIT 5
